name: pressprimer-assignment
description: Comprehensive assignment management for WordPress educators

scripts.plugin-zip: wp-scripts build && cd /Users/Ryan/Development/wordpress-plugins/pressprimer/pressprimer-assignment && /Applications/Local.app/Contents/Resources/extraResources/lightning-services/php-8.2.27+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php composer.phar install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/pressprimer-assignment && rsync -av --exclude-from='.distignore' ./ dist/pressprimer-assignment/ && cd dist && zip -r pressprimer-assignment.zip pressprimer-assignment && rm -rf pressprimer-assignment && cd /Users/Ryan/Development/wordpress-plugins/pressprimer/pressprimer-assignment && /Applications/Local.app/Contents/Resources/extraResources/lightning-services/php-8.2.27+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php composer.phar install && echo 'Created dist/pressprimer-assignment.zip'
